fields.description: JSON list of date/datetime fields offered as filter options in the document reports. Each entry: {"field": "posting_date", "type": "Date", "label": "Posting Date", "default": ""}. 'field' is the actual fieldname (creation/modified allowed); 'type' (Date or Datetime, case-insensitive) decides how the report filter renders and may differ from the column's real type (e.g. filter a Datetime column as a Date); 'label' is optional and is the text shown in the report's field dropdown (falls back to the doctype's field label); 'default' is optional and prefills the start of the range. Defaults to a single creation field when left blank.
fields.label: Report Date Fields
